task_completion.description: Set the 'Grade to pass' for the 'Safety Certification Exam' quiz to 80.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the quiz settings for 'Safety Certification Exam', under the 'Grade' section, the 'Grade to pass' input field displays '80.00'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Safety Certification Exam' activity completion settings to require a grade and a passing mark
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the quiz settings for 'Safety Certification Exam', under the 'Activity completion' section, the completion tracking is set to show as complete when conditions are met, and checkboxes for requiring a grade and requiring a passing grade are checked.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Employee Handbook' page to be marked complete when viewed
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the page settings for 'Employee Handbook', under the 'Activity completion' section, the completion tracking is set to show as complete when conditions are met, and the checkbox for 'Student must view this activity to complete it' is checked.

task_completion.description: Set the course completion requirements to require the completion of both the 'Employee Handbook' and the 'Safety Certification Exam'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Course completion settings for 'Workplace Safety' (SAFE101), under the 'Condition: Activity completion' section, the checkboxes next to both 'Employee Handbook' and 'Safety Certification Exam' are checked.

task_completion.description: Set the course completion aggregation condition to 'ALL'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Course completion settings, under the 'Condition: Activity completion' section, the 'Condition requires' dropdown is set to 'All selected activities to be completed'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Moodle's administration and course settings pages, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface is visible with proper styling, menus, and form elements, rather than a text editor or mock interface.
Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Save and display' or 'Save and return to course' buttons after modifying settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: SAFE101. Quiz name: Safety Certification Exam. Handbook name: Employee Handbook. Target grade to pass for the quiz: 80.00.
